subcodes.first_line: This is the Book which the Lord of all beings hath sent down that He may draw His servants nigh unto His horizon and adorn them with the ornament of His love and make mention of them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله مولی الوری لیقرب العباد الی افقه و یزینهم بطراز حبه و یذکرهم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @thankfulness; gratitude, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
